name: JSON Formatter
description: Format, beautify, minify, and validate JSON.

faq.q: What does the JSON formatter do?
faq.a: Pretty-prints minified or compact JSON with configurable indentation (2 spaces, 4 spaces, or tab), validates syntax and reports errors with line numbers, and can sort keys alphabetically.
No. Formatting runs entirely in your browser. Paste sensitive API responses, tokens, or configuration without concern.

faq.q: Can it convert JSON to other formats?
faq.a: Yes. Convert JSON to YAML, CSV (for flat arrays of objects), or TypeScript interface definitions.
Yes. Use the Minify tab to compress formatted JSON into a single line — useful before embedding in environment variables or HTTP requests.
No — it validates that the input is syntactically valid JSON, not that it conforms to a specific schema.
